name: BITSET
description: Set a specific bit in an integer value
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="BITSET" blockType="c" simulationFunctionName="bit_set_32" simulationFunctionType="C_OR_FORTRAN" style="BITSET">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="2" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="3"/>
    <data line="1" column="0" value="0"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <Array as="objectsParameters" scilabClass="ScilabInteger" intPrecision="sci_uint32">
    <data value="0"/>
  </Array>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="100.0" y="100.0" width="80.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: Uses INT32_MATRIX data type for both input and output
objectsParameters stores config with sci_uint32 precision
Uses sci_uint32 in objectsParameters (unlike BITCLEAR which uses sci_int32)
criticalRules: Uses INT32_MATRIX data type for both input and output
objectsParameters stores config with sci_uint32 precision
commonUses: Setting flag bits in control systems
